TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wang Ka Yee == kawas tay 1994, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 3, Wang Ka Yee, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Wang Ka Yee minkahul Hong kong na Cyukoku. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Wang Ka Yee hiya ga m'engi. Wang Ka Yee ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga Papillon (2017) ru OKAY (2017)
S.PHON: == waŋ ka jee == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, waŋ ka jee, s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjukokuʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral waŋ ka jee minkaħul ħoŋ koŋ na ʦ~ʨjukoku. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja waŋ ka jee ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. waŋ ka jee ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa papillon (****) ru okaj (****)
S.FORM: == Wang Ka Yee == kawas tay 1994, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 3, Wang Ka Yee, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Wang Ka Yee minkahul Hong kong na Cyukoku. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Wang Ka Yee hiya ga m'engi. Wang Ka Yee ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga Papillon (2017) ru OKAY (2017)
S.PHON: == waŋ ka jee == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, waŋ ka jee, s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjukokuʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral waŋ ka jee minkaħul ħoŋ koŋ na ʦ~ʨjukoku. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja waŋ ka jee ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. waŋ ka jee ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa papillon (****) ru okaj (****)
